---
title: "MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 04" 
description: "Lecture: U/G mine development"
date: 2020-11-06T08:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---

Dear all,

Lecture notes are available [here.](/upload/mad345t_w04_nov4-5.pdf) 

Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("hammer_and_pick")`
